subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance! Thou possessed the perceptive eye to have perceived the lights. Thou possessed an attentive ear
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی چشم بینا داشتی که مشاهده انوار نمودی گوش شنوا داشتی که ندای
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @firmness in the Covenant, @love of God
